prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: In a T3 work setting, the evaluated element is S-201 Rebar placement within 2.4 Structural & Ironwork. The relevant subcategory is 2.4.2 Reinforcing. The field notes describe visible cues consistent with: not enough for the requirement visible cue (visible cue touching form/ground). The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors ACI 318, ACI 117, placing drawings.
title: T3 S-201 Code/spec compliance
